nameMeanings.name: Murdoc
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Muireadhach, meaning ‘lord’, but said to be a derivative of muir ‘sea’.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Mormaer Murdoc of Levenach was born in 1056, in Clachan of Campsie, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Croc Crinan Levenax King Of Munster, was 36 and his mother, Mong Fionn, was 36. He had at least 2 sons.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mormaer Murdoc of Levenach est né en 1056, à Clachan of Campsie, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Croc Crinan Levenax King Of Munster, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Mong Fionn, avait 36 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils.

ja.Clachan of Campsie,Stirlingshire,Scotlan: イギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアクラチャン オフ カンプシ
ja.lifeSummary: Mormaer Murdoc of Levenachが1056年にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアクラチャン オフ カンプシで生まれた時，父Croc Crinan Levenax King Of Munsterは36歳，母Mong Fionnは36歳であった。彼は少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。

ko.Clachan of Campsie,Stirlingshire,Scotlan: 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 클라챈 프 캠프시
ko.lifeSummary: Mormaer Murdoc of Levenach(이)가 1056년 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 클라챈 프 캠프시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Croc Crinan Levenax King Of Munster(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Mong Fionn(은)는 36세였다. 그는 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다.
